details.test: Task 1: Availability + cheapest qualifying residential plan to checkout
Task 2: Build high-speed bundle under $130 and proceed to checkout
Task 3: Compare business fiber plans and submit quote
Task 4: Schedule earliest available morning installation appointment
Task 5: Change Wi-Fi network name, password, and security mode
Task 6: One-time partial bill payment of $45 without saving debit card
Task 7: Add static IP add-on to existing fiber plan and confirm order
Task 8: Check outage status and subscribe to SMS alerts
Task 9: Upgrade to qualifying Wi-Fi 6 router and add to cart
